name: Hoshi Arc Floor Lamp
subtitle: Brass & Marble Base
description: Hoshi (星, 'star') traces a long, unhurried arc over the space it inhabits. The weighted Carrara marble base needs no anchoring — its density alone holds the 180 cm brass arm steady. The hand-spun aluminium shade directs light downward in a precise warm pool, ideal for reading chairs and conversation corners.

details.label: Origin
details.value: Designed in Copenhagen, assembled in Portugal

care: Wipe marble base with a dry cloth only. Polish brass arm with a soft brass cloth occasionally. Do not use chemical cleaners on either surface.
shipping: Shipped in two separate boxes — base and arm. Standard delivery 5–7 business days. White-glove assembly available at checkout.
metaDescription: Hoshi Arc Floor Lamp — solid brass arm, honed Carrara marble base. Hand-spun aluminium shade. From $420 — BeautyHome by NODO Studio.
altText: Hoshi arc floor lamp with brushed brass arm and Carrara marble base, casting a warm pool of light over a reading chair
